location.nearest_airport: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata
location.nearest_major_hospital: B. C. Roy Technology Hospital (on campus)
location.technology_ecosystem: Large residential research campus; Kolkata and Bhubaneswar extension centres and Rajarhat research/innovation park links; local industry exposure is less immediate than in a metro.
location.cost_of_living_band: Low-to-moderate outside institutional charges; map-derived qualitative band
location.data_origin: Official address/rail distance plus map-derived coordinates, airport and city estimates

senior_junior_culture.summary: A small recent discussion reports approachable seniors and no ragging, but the evidence is too limited to characterize the entire institute. Official student-welfare and anti-ragging systems should be treated separately from experience claims.
positive_themes: Large hall and society networks can enable mentorship
negative_themes: Experience depends on hall, neighbours and society context

academic_culture.summary: Official curricula provide double-major, minor, micro-specialization and semester-away flexibility. Student discussions suggest a demanding environment and possible tension between abundant activities and academic focus, but attendance, grading and faculty accessibility vary and are not strongly evidenced.
negative_themes: Extracurricular overload can affect time management
academic_culture.evidence_strength: Official structure plus limited/conflicting student signal

hostel_reality.summary: IIT Kharagpur is a highly residential campus with many halls and regular catering. Public experiences show hall-to-hall variation in rooms, mess quality and neighbour experience; one room/video or complaint should not be generalized.
positive_themes: Night canteens and campus food options
Some positive reports of helpful hall communities

club_and_campus_life.summary: Official TSG pages show a broad and currently active technical, cultural, sports and welfare ecosystem. Independent comments also describe strong society and hall culture, though some students may find the volume of activities distracting.
positive_themes: Many active technical and cultural societies
negative_themes: Selection processes and society politics were not independently audited
club_and_campus_life.evidence_strength: Strong institution-published signal; limited student-reported qualification

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: Official CDC reports document a large placement and internship system and official TSG pages list multiple coding, analytics, robotics and developer societies. Company-level roles and non-CSE access are not sufficiently public to make guarantees.
negative_themes: Company-wise eligibility and role data are incomplete
coding_and_placement_culture.evidence_strength: Strong official institutional signal for scale; limited evidence for individual access

locality_and_student_life.summary: The main campus is approximately 5 km from Kharagpur Junction and far from Kolkata. The large self-contained campus supports daily life, but students seeking frequent metro-city exposure may find the location relatively isolated.
positive_themes: On-campus shops, banks, food and healthcare
negative_themes: Airport and Kolkata access require long travel
locality_and_student_life.evidence_strength: Official location evidence plus limited student signal

overall_satisfaction.summary: Evidence supports academic breadth, strong technical/cultural communities and a large residential ecosystem. Recurring concerns involve mess variability, location isolation and workload/time management. There is not enough representative evidence to state whether students generally would choose IIT Kharagpur again.
negative_themes: Academic and activity overload for some students
overall_satisfaction.evidence_strength: Moderate mixed signal; no numeric rating

parent_mode_summary.label: Perspective summary — mixed official/calculated/student-reported evidence
parent_mode_summary.summary: IIT Kharagpur offers a large, residential and academically broad environment with verified 2026 seat/fee information and extensive historical cutoff data. Parents should confirm the tentative final fee demand, hall allotment and current placement report, while treating scholarships and placements as non-guaranteed.

student_mode_summary.label: Perspective summary — mixed official/calculated/student-reported evidence
student_mode_summary.summary: Students gain access to 24 current programmes, double-major/minor/micro-specialization options, technical and cultural societies, internships and a large residential peer network. Branch change is unavailable, hall/mess experience varies, and the campus is relatively isolated from Kolkata.

decision_risks.severity: High if the student is unsure of branch

decision_risks.evidence: CDC registration and NIRF graduating-cohort measures differ; historical reports contain scope conflicts.
Official inventory differs by scope and student reports conflict on quality.
Main campus is about 120 km from Kolkata and 5 km from Kharagpur station.
decision_risks.severity: Moderate for students seeking frequent metro exposure

decision_risks.evidence: Eligibility and current award amount/deadline require notice-level verification.

data_gaps: Official 2026 JoSAA cutoffs are not yet available and were not predicted as official.
The final 2025-26 placement report and company-wise role, branch eligibility, package and selection data are not public in a complete structured form.
The 2026-27 JoSAA fee table is tentative and must be confirmed at admission.
Current room-sharing pattern, hall-wise capacity, laundry, curfew and first-year allotment details require HMC confirmation.
Institute-specific AICTE, NAAC and programme-level NBA records were not verified; IIT Kharagpur is a statutory Institute of National Importance.
Current scholarship amounts, deadlines and NSP notified-institution matches require 2026-27 notice-level confirmation.
Recent dated achievements and induction processes were not verified for every club.
Student-experience evidence is self-selected and insufficient for numeric campus-culture ratings.
